scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client
scripts.build:prod: NODE_ENV=production pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client:prod
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:shared & pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:client
scripts.test: pnpm run test:shared && pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:client
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:shared -- --coverage && pnpm run test:server -- --coverage && pnpm run test:client -- --coverage
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:client && pnpm run lint:server && pnpm run lint:shared
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:client -- --fix && pnpm run lint:server -- --fix && pnpm run lint:shared -- --fix
scripts.analyze: pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-client build --config vite.config.production.ts && open client/dist/stats.html
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-client clean && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-server clean && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-shared clean
scripts.clean:windows: if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-client clean && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-server clean && pnpm --filter discord-dashboard-shared clean
scripts.precommit: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test
